description: Adversarial inputs for A5 verifying skill-writer.

cases.description: Create a skill that overlaps an existing one
cases.input_content: create a skill that compresses prose paragraphs
cases.expected: Phase 1 dedup sweep flags prose-guidelines as DUPLICATE; recommend improving prose-guidelines instead

cases.description: Modify a skill that does not exist
cases.expected: Phase 2 errors with 'skill not found'; no Phase 6 invocation

cases.description: Skill A references skill B which references skill A
cases.input_content: create skill A that uses B (B already uses A)
cases.expected: Cross-ref / dedup check flags circular dependency; user warned

cases.description: Request asks one skill to do 3 unrelated things
cases.input_content: create a skill that deploys firmware, reviews PRs, and audits prose
cases.expected: Phase 1 sweep recommends 3 separate skills; OR Phase 6 verify-skill A4 flags CONTRACT_BROKEN (description fails scope-consistency)

cases.description: New skill name matches existing skill (case-insensitive)
cases.expected: Phase 1 sweep flags name collision before Phase 2 starts

cases.description: Request lacks a description field for skill-creator
cases.expected: skill-writer asks user for description before invoking skill-creator
